name: Array
description: Contiguous block of elements accessed by index.

name: String
description: Sequence of characters — often treated as a char array.

name: Hash Map
description: Key-value store with O(1) average lookup.

name: Hash Set
description: Unordered collection of unique elements.

name: Two Pointers
description: Left/right (or slow/fast) pointer technique on arrays or lists.

name: Sorting
description: Arranging elements in order; enables binary search and two-pointer patterns.

name: Binary Search
description: O(log n) search on a sorted structure.

name: Sliding Window
description: Variable or fixed window over a sequence.

name: Linked List
description: Chain of nodes each holding a value and a next pointer.

name: Stack
description: LIFO structure; used for DFS, expression evaluation, monotonic problems.

name: Queue
description: FIFO structure; used for BFS and level-order traversal.

name: Deque
description: Double-ended queue; supports push/pop from both ends.

name: Heap / Priority Queue
description: Complete binary tree; O(log n) insert/extract-min/max.

name: Tree
description: Hierarchical node structure; binary trees, BSTs, N-ary trees.

name: Binary Tree
description: Each node has at most two children.

name: Binary Search Tree
description: Binary tree with left < node < right invariant.

name: Trie
description: Prefix tree for string storage and lookup.

name: Graph
description: Nodes (vertices) connected by edges; directed or undirected.

name: Union-Find
description: Disjoint-set structure for connectivity queries.

name: Dynamic Programming
description: Overlapping subproblems solved once and cached.

name: Backtracking
description: Systematic exploration of all candidates, pruning invalid branches.

name: Greedy
description: Locally optimal choice at each step.

name: Bit Manipulation
description: Operations directly on integer bits.

name: Math
description: Number theory, combinatorics, geometry problems.

name: Intervals
description: Problems on overlapping or merging ranges.

name: Matrix
description: 2D grid problems — traversal, DP on grids, island counting.
